author: Azona77
description: A lightweight panel for tabs. Supports vertical, card and masonry layout. Performance first. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Azona77
manifest.description: A lightweight independent panel for open tabs.
manifest.name: Lite Tabs

name: Lite Tabs

releases.author: Azona77
releases.description:
## 中文

- 修复平板/移动端工具栏按钮与关闭按钮宽度异常，稳定图标显示。
- 移动端默认在主工作区标签页打开 Lite Tabs，避免依赖侧栏拖拽。
- 新增“Open in main workspace tab”命令，并补充搜索快捷键提示。

## English

- Fixed oversized toolbar and close buttons on tablet/mobile, keeping icons visible and square.
- Open Lite Tabs in the main workspace by default on mobile, without relying on sidebar dragging.
- Added an “Open in main workspace tab” command and clearer search shortcut hints.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.7

releases.author: Azona77
releases.description:
## 中文

- 优化搜索键盘交互：方向键切换当前结果，Enter 打开，Escape 清空或退出。
- 统一拖拽提交决策，降低桌面与移动端排序逻辑重复。
- 收敛样式 token、焦点态和 reduced-motion 支持，并补充长期开发与 CI/测试基础。

## English

- Improved search keyboard flow: arrow keys select the current result, Enter opens it, and Escape clears or exits.
- Unified drag-drop commit decisions to reduce duplicated desktop and mobile sorting logic.
- Consolidated style tokens, focus states, and reduced-motion support, with long-term development and CI/test foundations.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.6

releases.author: Azona77
releases.description:
﻿## English

### What's changed
- Removed the remaining inline `touch-action` style writes from mobile pointer dragging.
- Replaced the temporary touch behavior with a CSS class-driven drag source state.
- Keeps the previous mobile drag behavior while satisfying `obsidianmd/no-static-styles-assignment`.

### Verification
- `npm run build`
- `npm run check:boundaries`
- `git diff --check`

## 中文

### 更新内容
- 移除了移动端 pointer 拖拽中剩余的 inline `touch-action` 样式写入。
- 改为通过 CSS class 控制拖拽源元素的触摸行为。
- 保持原有移动端拖拽行为，同时满足 `obsidianmd/no-static-styles-assignment` 检查。

### 验证
- `npm run build`
- `npm run check:boundaries`
- `git diff --check`
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
﻿## English

### What's changed
- Fixed Obsidian plugin lint findings for source compatibility and release readiness.
- Replaced direct static style assignments with Obsidian CSS helpers where applicable.
- Improved popout-window compatibility by using `activeDocument` and element-owned animation frame APIs.
- Avoided newer workspace APIs than the declared `minAppVersion` so Lite Tabs remains compatible with Obsidian 1.5.0+.
- Updated command IDs and command names to follow Obsidian plugin conventions.

### Verification
- `npm run build`
- `npm run check:boundaries`
- `git diff --check`

## 中文

### 更新内容
- 修复 Obsidian 插件 lint 检查中发现的源码兼容性问题，提升发布合规性。
- 将适用位置的直接样式赋值改为 Obsidian CSS helper。
- 使用 `activeDocument` 和元素所属 window 的 animation frame API，改善弹出窗口兼容性。
- 避免使用高于当前 `minAppVersion` 声明的新 workspace API，继续保持 Obsidian 1.5.0+ 兼容。
- 按 Obsidian 插件规范更新命令 ID 和命令名称。

### 验证
- `npm run build`
- `npm run check:boundaries`
- `git diff --check`
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.4

releases.author: Azona77
releases.description:
﻿## English

### What's new
- Added a vault-relative `data-path` attribute to file-backed `.lite-tabs-item` elements, so custom CSS snippets can target tabs by folder or file path.
- Non-file tabs do not receive `data-path`, preventing stale or misleading attributes.

### Example
```css
.lite-tabs-item[data-path^="ExamplePath/"] {
	background-color: #441111;
}
```

### Verification
- `npm run build`
- `npm run check:boundaries`

## 中文

### 更新内容
- 为基于文件的 `.lite-tabs-item` 元素新增相对 vault 的 `data-path` 属性，方便用 CSS 片段按文件夹或文件路径定制标签样式。
- 非文件类标签不会带有 `data-path`，避免出现过期或误导性的路径属性。

### 示例
```css
.lite-tabs-item[data-path^="ExamplePath/"] {
	background-color: #441111;
}
```

### 验证
- `npm run build`
- `npm run check:boundaries`
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

本次补丁增强移动端拖动手柄的可见性。

- 增大列表视图拖动手柄图标尺寸和笔画。
- 提升拖动手柄默认状态与拖动状态的对比度。

## English

This patch improves mobile drag handle visibility.

- Increased the list-view drag handle icon size and stroke width.
- Improved drag handle contrast in both idle and dragging states.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

本次补丁修复移动端按钮布局细节，建议所有 1.3.0 用户升级。

### 修复

- 修复移动端按钮布局问题。
- 保留 1.3.0 中的 Masonry 分组、固定标签页和搜索增强功能。

## English

This patch fixes mobile button layout details and is recommended for all 1.3.0 users.

### Fixed

- Fixed mobile button layout behavior.
- Keeps the Masonry grouping, pinned tabs, and search improvements introduced in 1.3.0.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

本次更新完善了 Masonry 视图的分组体验，并增加固定标签页与搜索增强功能。

### 新增

- Masonry 视图支持与 Card 视图一致的分组分隔显示。
- 新增右键固定/取消固定标签页。
- 搜索框支持按 Enter 激活第一个匹配标签页。
- 搜索匹配文本高亮显示。

### 改进

- 优化 Masonry 分组拖放区域，减少跨组排序误判。
- 稳定 Masonry 刷新布局，降低拖放后的卡片跳动。
- 固定标签页新增折角标记，并在 hover 时显示取消固定按钮。
- 优化标签页关闭/固定按钮的浮现动画。
- 改进图标与标题在不同字号下的纵向对齐。

## English

This update improves grouped Masonry behavior and adds pinned tabs plus richer search interactions.

### New

- Added group separators to Masonry view, matching Card view behavior.
- Added context-menu actions to pin and unpin tabs.
- Search now activates the first matching tab with Enter.
- Search matches are highlighted in tab titles.

### Improved

- Improved Masonry drag-and-drop hit areas around groups.
- Stabilized Masonry layout refreshes to reduce card jumping after drops.
- Added a corner ribbon marker for pinned tabs, with hover-to-unpin behavior.
- Refined close/pin button reveal animations.
- Improved vertical alignment between tab icons and titles across font sizes.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## English

### New

- Added mobile drag handles with an option to hide them.
- Mobile bottom stacking is enabled by default for new users.

### Improved

- Card and Masonry mobile drag handles now use a left-side vertical grip to avoid blocking vertical scrolling.
- Card and Masonry views keep close buttons visible on mobile.
- Bottom alignment now works with normal scrolling by measuring visible content and adding spacer only when content does not overflow.

### Fixed

- Fixed Card and Masonry title width after adding drag handles.
- Fixed inconsistent mobile scrolling after switching layouts.
- Reduced conflicts between drag handles and the sidebar swipe gesture.

### Notes

- Desktop behavior is unchanged.

## 中文

### 新增

- 新增移动端拖动手柄显示开关。
- 新用户默认开启移动端底部堆叠。

### 改进

- 卡片和瀑布流视图的移动端拖动手柄改为左侧竖向区域，减少对上下滑动的干扰。
- 卡片和瀑布流视图在移动端常驻显示关闭按钮。
- 底部对齐改为按可见内容测量，只在内容未溢出时补齐空间，兼容正常滚动。

### 修复

- 修复加入手柄后卡片和瀑布流标题宽度异常。
- 修复移动端切换视图后滚动偶发卡在底部的问题。
- 降低拖动手柄与侧边栏横滑收起手势的冲突。

### 说明

- 桌面端行为保持不变。
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## English

### New

- Added a mobile option to stack Lite Tabs at the bottom of the left sidebar for easier one-handed navigation.

### Fixed

- Removed the CSS `column-gap` usage that triggered Obsidian 1.11.4's partial `multicolumn` support warning.

### Notes

- The bottom-stack option applies to List, Card, and Masonry layouts on mobile only.
- Desktop layout behavior is unchanged.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## English

### New

- Added a masonry-style tab layout.
- Masonry cards automatically adapt their height to tab title length.

### Improved

- Refined drag-and-drop behavior for masonry cards.
- Added clearer drop indicators for masonry sorting.
- Added short post-drop visual feedback so the moved tab is easier to locate after layout reflow.
- Kept masonry dependency-free, using measured CSS grid spans and batched refreshes.

### Notes

- Existing List and Card layouts remain unchanged.
- Masonry uses existing card-related appearance settings, including card width, font size, and gap.
- No vault file access, network access, clipboard access, or persistent layout cache was added.

## 中文

### 新增

- 新增瀑布流标签页布局。
- 瀑布流卡片会根据标签标题长度自动调整高度。

### 改进

- 优化瀑布流卡片的拖动排序行为。
- 改进瀑布流排序时的落点提示。
- 新增短暂的拖动完成反馈，便于在布局重排后定位被移动的标签。
- 瀑布流实现不引入新依赖，使用测量后的 CSS grid span 与合并刷新。

### 说明

- 现有列表和卡片布局保持不变。
- 瀑布流复用现有卡片相关外观设置，包括卡片宽度、字体大小和间距。
- 本版本未新增仓库文件访问、网络访问、剪贴板访问或持久布局缓存。
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## English

- Added local tab title filtering.
- Added release safety boundary checks.
- Hardened settings loading and workspace tab operations.
- Improved drag reorder performance.

## 中文

- 新增已打开标签页标题过滤。
- 新增发布前安全边界检查。
- 加固设置加载与工作区标签操作。
- 优化拖拽排序性能。
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Lite Tabs 1.0.1

This patch release refreshes the GitHub release notes with clean UTF-8-safe text so downstream plugin pages do not display corrupted release text.

Changes:
- Bump plugin version to 1.0.1.
- Keep the plugin ID as lite-tabs and the display name as Lite Tabs.
- Keep the same release assets: main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
- Preserve the attested release workflow for build provenance.
releases.name: Lite Tabs 1.0.1
